meaning: n.四分之一,[常 pl.] 方向,地区,方面,季,季度,一刻钟 num.四分之一,刻
examples: Nowitzki fouled Mitchell early in the third quarter.
It's (a) quarter to four now—I'll meet you at (a) quarter past.
The moon is in its first quarter.
Consumers purchased 3.47 million Mac computers, 9.41 million iPods and 3.27 million iPads throughout the quarter.
Goldman Sachs and Citigroup blew past third-quarter profit expectations Thursday, helped by big one-time gains.
